title: oenothera filiformis
intro: Oenothera filiformis, also known as the slender evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting heart health due to its ability to lower cholesterol levels and prevent blood clots. Oenothera filiformis can be prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or tinctures, or used in teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
